MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND (TRANSACTION ID # 100042589) FILED BY DEFENDANT ECHEGUREN, SIMONE V HEARING SET FOR SEP-04-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF JAN-16-2018 SET ASIDE
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-04-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT V.SIMONE ECHEGUREN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B), AND CCP 473.5 AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SIMONE ECHEGUREN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST HER ON JANUARY 16, 2018 AND THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST HER ON JANUARY 18, 2018 IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE NOW SET ASIDE. MS. ECHEGUREN MUST FILE AN ANSWER NO LATER SEPTEMBER 13, 2018. MS. ECHEGUREN HAS SHOWN THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO HAVE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT SET ASIDE PER CCP 473.5. PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING HAS NOT SHOWN THAT MS. ECHEGUREN'S SWORN STATEMENTS THAT SHE FIRST LEARNED OF THIS CASE ON OR AROUND JANUARY 18, 2018 AND DID NOT SEEK TO EVADE SERVICE ARE FALSE. CALIFORNIA'S STRONG POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERITS AND THE ABSENCE OF ANY CLAIMED PREJUDICE BY LVNV FURTHER SUPPORTS THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION. WHILE THIS MOTION COULD HAVE BEEN FILED EARLIER, THE FAILURE TO DO SO SHOULD NOT DEPRIVE MS. ECHEGUREN OF HER RIGHT TO DEFEND THE CASE ON ITS MERITS. LVNV'S REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED SINCE LVNV SHOULD HAVE STIPULATED TO THE SETTING ASIDE OF THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT WHICH WOULD HAVE MADE THIS MOTION UNNECESSARY. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. =(302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-15-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT V.SIMONE ECHEGUREN'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473(b), AND CCP 473.5 as follows: Defendant Simone Echeguren's motion to set aside the default entered against her on January 16, 2018 and the default judgment entered against her on January 18, 2018 is granted. The default and default judgment are now set aside. Ms. Echeguren must file an answer no later September 13, 2018. Ms. Echeguren has shown that she is entitled to have the default and default judgment set aside per CCP 473.5. Plaintiff LVNV Funding has not shown that Ms. Echeguren's sworn statements that she first learned of this case on or around January 18, 2018 and did not seek to evade service are false. California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and the absence of any claimed prejudice by LVNV further supports the granting of the motion. While this motion could have been filed earlier, the failure to do so should not deprive Ms. Echeguren of her right to defend the case on its merits. LVNV's request for fees is denied since LVNV should have stipulated to the setting aside of the default and default judgment which would have made this motion unnecessary. Order signed. (see signed order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
